title: Build manga reading platform with authentication, library, and reader

requirements.text: Implement user authentication using Internet Identity with passkey-based login, ensuring users can sign up and log in to access protected features

quotes: Protected routes (only logged-in users can read manga)

acceptanceCriteria: Users can authenticate using Internet Identity
Unauthenticated users cannot access manga reading features
Authentication state persists across page refreshes
Logout functionality clears authentication state

requirements.text: Create backend data models in Motoko for User with fields: principal (identity), username, email, role (admin/user), bookmarks (array of manga IDs), readingHistory (array of manga ID + chapter number pairs), and createdAt timestamp

quotes: User Schema: username, email, password, createdAt

acceptanceCriteria: User data persists across canister upgrades
User records are indexed by principal ID
Role field distinguishes between admin and regular users

requirements.text: Create backend data models in Motoko for Manga with fields: id, title, description, coverImage (URL), chapters (array of Chapter objects), and createdAt timestamp

quotes: Manga Schema: title, description, coverImage, chapters (array)

acceptanceCriteria: Manga records are stored persistently
Each manga has a unique ID
Chapters are embedded within manga records

requirements.text: Create backend data model for Chapter within Manga with fields: chapterNumber, title, and images (array of image URLs)

quotes: Chapter Schema: chapterNumber, title, images (array of image URLs)

acceptanceCriteria: Chapters are ordered by chapter number
Each chapter contains an array of image URLs for pages

requirements.text: Implement backend methods: getMangaList (public, returns all manga with pagination support), getMangaById (public, returns full manga with all chapters), searchManga (public, filters by title/description), addManga (admin-only), addChapter (admin-only), and updateManga (admin-only)

quotes: Admin features to add manga and chapters

acceptanceCriteria: Public methods return manga data without authentication
Admin methods verify caller has admin role
Search filters manga by matching title or description text
Pagination returns configurable page size and supports page navigation

requirements.text: Implement backend methods for user features: addBookmark (authenticated), removeBookmark (authenticated), getBookmarks (authenticated, returns user's bookmarked manga), recordReadingHistory (authenticated, tracks manga ID + chapter number), and getReadingHistory (authenticated)
acceptanceCriteria: Only authenticated users can access these methods
Bookmarks are stored per user and persist
Reading history tracks most recent chapters read per manga
Users can retrieve their own bookmarks and history

requirements.text: Create a home page displaying all manga in a grid layout with each manga card showing cover image, title, truncated description, and a 'Read Now' button that navigates to the manga details page

quotes: Display manga list in grid layout
Each manga should have: Cover image, Title, Description, 'Read Now' button

acceptanceCriteria: Grid layout is responsive (adjusts columns based on screen size)
Cover images load properly
Read Now button navigates to correct manga details page
Long descriptions are truncated with ellipsis

requirements.text: Create a manga details page that displays manga title, cover image, full description, and a list of all chapters with chapter numbers and titles, where clicking a chapter navigates to the reader page for that chapter
acceptanceCriteria: All chapter information is displayed clearly
Chapters are listed in order by chapter number
Clicking a chapter opens the reader for that specific chapter
Page shows bookmark and reading history status

requirements.text: Create a manga reader page that displays chapter images in a vertical scroll layout, allows users to navigate between chapters, shows current chapter number and title, and provides a back button to return to manga details
acceptanceCriteria: Images load sequentially in vertical scroll
Reader is fully responsive on mobile and desktop
Navigation buttons allow moving to previous/next chapter
Current chapter information is clearly displayed
Reading progress is automatically recorded to history

requirements.text: Implement a dark mode toggle that switches between light and dark themes, persisting the user's preference in localStorage, with dark mode as the default theme using background color #0f0f0f
acceptanceCriteria: Toggle button is accessible from all pages
Theme preference persists across sessions
Dark mode uses #0f0f0f background
All text remains readable in both modes

requirements.text: Create an admin panel page (accessible only to admin users) with forms to add new manga (title, description, cover image URL), add chapters to existing manga (select manga, enter chapter number, title, and array of image URLs), and view all manga with edit capabilities

quotes: Upload manga images (store image URLs for now)

acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel is only accessible to users with admin role
Forms validate required fields before submission
Successfully added manga/chapters appear immediately in the library
Non-admin users are redirected if they attempt to access admin routes

requirements.text: Implement a search feature on the home page with a search input that filters manga by title or description in real-time, showing results as the user types
acceptanceCriteria: Search input is prominently placed on home page
Results update as user types (debounced)
Search matches both title and description text
Clear search button resets to show all manga

requirements.text: Implement pagination controls on the home page to display manga in pages with configurable page size (default 12 per page), showing page numbers, previous/next buttons, and current page indicator
acceptanceCriteria: Pagination controls are intuitive and accessible
Page state is reflected in URL query parameters
Users can navigate between pages smoothly
Page size is configurable

requirements.text: Add bookmark functionality with a bookmark button on manga details pages that toggles bookmark status, and create a bookmarks page showing all bookmarked manga for the authenticated user
acceptanceCriteria: Bookmark button shows current bookmark state
Clicking bookmark button adds/removes bookmark
Bookmarks page displays all bookmarked manga
Bookmark state persists across sessions

requirements.text: Create a reading history page that displays all manga the user has read with the most recent chapter accessed, sorted by most recent read first, with links to continue reading from the last accessed chapter
acceptanceCriteria: History page shows manga title, cover, and last read chapter
List is sorted by most recently read
Continue reading button navigates to last accessed chapter
History updates automatically when user reads chapters

requirements.text: Apply a modern anime-inspired theme with dark background (#0f0f0f as default), purple or red accent colors, smooth animations on hover and transitions, and ensure full mobile responsiveness across all pages
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme uses #0f0f0f background with purple or red accents
Hover effects and transitions are smooth and subtle
All pages are fully responsive on mobile devices
Typography and spacing follow modern design principles

requirements.text: Implement protected routes that redirect unauthenticated users to the login page when attempting to access manga reader, bookmarks, history, or admin pages

quotes: Protected routes (only logged-in users can read manga)

acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users cannot access protected pages
Users are redirected to appropriate login flow
After authentication, users are redirected to originally requested page
Admin routes additionally check for admin role

constraints: Use Motoko for backend instead of Node.js/Express/MongoDB
Use Internet Identity for authentication instead of JWT tokens
Cannot integrate Cloudinary; use direct image URLs or alternative Internet Computer storage solutions
All backend logic must exist in the single main actor file
Cannot modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity hooks, useActor, main.tsx, and ui components
nonGoals: Traditional session/refresh token management (Internet Identity handles authentication differently)

required: Placeholder manga cover image with anime aesthetic, purple gradient background (manga-cover-placeholder.dim_400x600.png)
Default user avatar with anime style (user-avatar-default.dim_128x128.png)
Bookmark icon in purple or red accent color (bookmark-icon.dim_64x64.png)
Reading history icon with anime aesthetic (history-icon.dim_64x64.png)
